description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage called check. Add a check job using the rust:1.28 image that runs cargo rustc -- -D warnings. Add a doc job using rustlang/rust:nightly that runs cargo rustdoc -- --deny warnings. Add a fmt job using rustlang/rust:nightly that first runs rustup component add rustfmt-preview then cargo fmt -- --check. Add a test job using rust:1.28 that runs cargo test. All jobs belong to the check stage and have no caches, artifacts, or special triggers.
